languages.text: "Ты никогда не отличал{mf|ся|ась} достаточной цивилизованностью для компетентного взаимодействия. Есть лимиты, за которые твоему виду невозможно выйти".

traits.locale_text: "Ты никогда не отличал{mf|ся|ась} достаточной цивилизованностью для компетентного взаимодействия. Есть лимиты, за которые твоему виду невозможно выйти".

languages.text: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."
languages.original_text: "Ты никогда не отличал{mf|ся|ась} достаточной цивилизованностью для компетентного взаимодействия. Есть лимиты, за которые твоему виду невозможно выйти".

traits.locale_text: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."
"You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."
"You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."

languages.text: “你总是缺那么点教养，做不了真正得力的盟友。总有一些极限，是你们这类物种无法突破的。”
languages.original_text: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."

traits.locale_text: “你总是缺那么点教养，做不了真正得力的盟友。总有一些极限，是你们这类物种无法突破的。”

languages.text: «No eres lo bastante civilizad{mf|o|a} para servir de aliad{mf|o|a} de verdad. Hay límites que tu especie es incapaz de superar».
languages.original_text: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."

traits.locale_text: «No eres lo bastante civilizad{mf|o|a} para servir de aliad{mf|o|a} de verdad. Hay límites que tu especie es incapaz de superar».

languages.text: « Vous n'avez jamais été suffisamment {mf|civilisé|civilisée} pour devenir {mf|un allié|une alliée} digne de ce nom. Il existe des limites que votre engeance est incapable de franchir. »
languages.original_text: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'avez jamais été suffisamment {mf|civilisé|civilisée} pour devenir {mf|un allié|une alliée} digne de ce nom. Il existe des limites que votre engeance est incapable de franchir. »

languages.text: "Hiçbir zaman gerçekten becerikli bir müttefik olacak kadar medeni değildin. Türünüzün ötesine geçmesinin imkânsız olduğu sınırlar var."
languages.original_text: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."

traits.locale_text: "Hiçbir zaman gerçekten becerikli bir müttefik olacak kadar medeni değildin. Türünüzün ötesine geçmesinin imkânsız olduğu sınırlar var."

languages.text: "Du warst als wirklich {mf|kompetenter Verbündeter|kompetente Verbündete} nie zivilisiert genug. Es gibt Grenzen, die deinesgleichen nicht überschreiten kann."
languages.original_text: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."

traits.locale_text: "Du warst als wirklich {mf|kompetenter Verbündeter|kompetente Verbündete} nie zivilisiert genug. Es gibt Grenzen, die deinesgleichen nicht überschreiten kann."

languages.text: 「君たちは、真の同盟国として十分に文明的ではなかった。君たちの種族は、その限界を超えることはできない。」
languages.original_text: "You never were quite civilised enough to be a truly capable ally. There are limits beyond which it is impossible for your kind to go."

traits.locale_text: 「君たちは、真の同盟国として十分に文明的ではなかった。君たちの種族は、その限界を超えることはできない。」
